message:
fix: ephemeral store routing gaps (bd-h3hhu0, bd-n8tbnx, bd-hoio75)

- CreateIssuesWithFullOptions: route all-ephemeral batches to SQLite
- ClaimIssue: add atomic check-and-set to ephemeral store
- GetDependenciesWithMetadata/GetDependentsWithMetadata/GetDependencyTree:
  add ephemeral routing and SQLite implementations
- Routing transaction: write methods now call ensureEphemeral() instead
  of checking ephTx != nil, preventing fallthrough to Dolt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
